description_long: This arcade game cabinet, labeled 'Tower Tipper,' features a tall, upright structure with a prominent display screen and a control panel below. The cabinet is primarily black with vibrant, multicolored geometric shapes and cubes decorating the front and side panels, giving it a playful and modern aesthetic. The marquee at the top displays the game title in bold, illuminated letters with a red and purple color scheme. The control panel includes two joysticks and several round buttons, suggesting support for at least two players. A coin slot is visible on the front, indicating its use in public or commercial gaming environments. The cabinet's construction appears to be a combination of wood or MDF, plastic, and metal, with a glossy finish on the exterior surfaces.
description: A tall, black arcade game cabinet with colorful geometric graphics, a large screen, illuminated marquee, and a control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated 'Tower Tipper' marquee, large display screen, control panel with two joysticks and buttons, and a coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's profile and the vibrant geometric cube graphics running up the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with no visible graphics or controls, only access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same colorful geometric cube artwork and the cabinet's contoured shape.
attribute_screen_type: CRT or flat LCD, rectangular with a flat surface and visible bezel; exact type unknown due to lack of visible curvature or pixel structure.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple round buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a black and red color scheme and geometric accents.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Tower Tipper' title in bold, illuminated red and purple letters with a glowing effect, set against a black background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display colorful, three-dimensional geometric cubes in red, blue, purple, orange, and yellow, arranged in a playful, scattered pattern.
